text.heading: 925 OPENING
text.p: The Chairman welcomed members to the meeting. He noted that the meeting was scheduled primarily to consider some urgent cases of contract appointments in preparation for the forthcoming accreditation.
text.heading: 926 ADOPTION OF THE MINUTES OF THE LAST MEETING
text.p: The Minutes of the last meeting of the Faculty Review Panel held on 9th June, 2009 were taken and adopted as correct records of proceeding at the meeting. However the Panel observed some mistakes in the numbering of the minutes. This was noted by the Secretariat.
text.heading: 927: MATTERS ARISING
text.p: The Panel noted that action had been taken on all the recommendations it considered at the meeting as appropriate.
However, slight modifications were made on the manner of reporting while the Secretariat was advised to take care of some observable inconsistencies while processing the cases further.
text.heading: 928: APPLICATION FOR CONTRACT APPOINTMENT AT PROFESSORIAL LEVEL - PROFESOR X.X. XXX - DEPARTMENT OF DEMOGRAPHY AND SOCIAL STATISTICS
RECORD OF SERVICE
text.p: Name of Staff -
Date of Assumption of Duty - 1st December, 1971
Status on first Appointment - Graduate Assistant
Present Status - Professor
text.heading: COMMENTS OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel received and considered Paper No which contained application for contract appointment as Professor in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics.

The Panel noted that Professor was a leading Nigerian Demographer who had remained relevant both in the training of Demographers and in national development. It also noted that though Professor had just disengaged from the University, he still has Seven (7) Graduate Students, Six (6) Ph.D Students and one (1) M.sc Student under his supervision. For Professor to desire to come back to the system was quite commendable.

The Panel also noted that given Professor 's impressive academic profile and his international reach, his appointment will add great value to the Department of Demography and Social Statistics and to the University in general.
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: In view of the fact that Professor was an insider in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics, his readiness to assist the Department further and his high profile expertise, the Faculty Review Panel recommended that Professor be appointed as Professor on contract in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics with effect from 1st October 2009.
text.heading: 929: APPLICATION FOR CONTRACT APPOINTMENT:-MRS. XXX DEPARTMENT OF DEMOGRAPHY AND SOCIAL STATISTICS
RECORD OF SERVICE
text.p: Name of Staff -
Date of Assumption of Duty - 1st November, 1975
Status on first Appointment - Graduate Assistant
Present Status - Professor
text.heading: COMMENTS OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel received and considered Paper No which contained application for contract appointment as Professor in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics.
The Panel noted that Professor had three decades of invaluable contributions to the work and progress of the Department in particular and the University as a whole.
The Panel also noted that the Department still needed the leadership and mentorship of the Professor aside from postgraduate students' supervision and teaching.
It was noted in addition that the services of Professor , would be needed in preparation for the forthcoming accreditation exercise.
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: Since Professor 's services were still very much required in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics and she was willing to render further service, the Faculty recommended that Professor be appointed as Professor on contract in the Department of Demography and Social Statistics with effect from 1st December 2009.
text.heading: 930: APPLICATION FOR REBNEWAL OF APPOINTMENT
PROFESSOR XXX - DEPARTMENT OD GEOGRAPHY
RECORD OF SERVICE
text.p: Name of Staff -
Date of Assumption of Duty - 1st September, 1966
Status on first Appointment - Assistant Lecturer
Present Status - Professor
text.heading: COMMENTS OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel received an considered Paper No which contained application for contract appointment, and the curriculum vitae of Professor .

The Panel noted that the services of Professor were still very much needed in the Department. It also noted that Professor taught three (3) courses in the Harmattan Semester and that his teaching was of the highest quality. Professor also participated in the Departmental Seminars where his contributions had enhanced the quality of discussions. It was further noted that Professor was involved in a research alongside Drs. A. , and T. O. on the effect of climate change on river drainage regimes in the River Kaduna basin.

The Panel noted that Professor 's services were indispensable in the Department as two Lecturers in the lower cadre would not be available for teaching in the session. The two are on leave for further studies.
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel after due consideration of the matter recommended that Professor 's contract appointment be renewed from October 1, 2009.
text.heading: 931: APPLICATION FOR CONTRACT APPOINTMENT AT PROFESSORIAL LEVEL - PROF. XXX - DEPARTMENT OF POLITICAL SCIENCE
RECORD OF SERVICE
text.p: Name of Staff -
Date of Assumption of Duty - 2007
Status on first Appointment - Associate Lecturer (Professorial cadre)
Department of Political Science, University of Lagos, Lagos
Present Status - Professor
text.heading: COMMENTS OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel received and considered Paper No which contained application for Contract Appointment in respect of Professor , minutes of the Departmental Review Panel meeting and the curriculum vitae of Professor .

The Panel noted that the programme of the Department of Political Science needed to be strengthened in the area of Political Theory. It was also noted that Professor was one of the leading Political Scientists in the country who specialized in the area of Theory. It was further noted that if offered contract appointment, Professor would add value to the undergraduate programme of the Department as well as the braining of Ph.D candidates in the Department.
It was also noted that Professor was an international scholar of repute, and his appointment would add value to the academic programmes of the Department of Political Science
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: In view of Professor 's high academic standing and relevance, the Panel recommended that he be appointed on contract as Professor in the Department of Political Science for two years in the first instance.
text.heading: 932: APPLICATION FOR LEAVE OF ABSENCE - MR. XXXDEPARTMENT OF POLITICAL SCIENCE
RECORD OF SERVICE
text.p: Name of Staff - Mr.
Date of First Appointment - January 2000
Status on First Appointment - Lecturer I
Present Status - Lecturer I
Date of Last Promotion Regrading - October 1, 2007
Date of Confirmation of Appointment - October 1, 2205
Present Salary - UASS 04 step 4
text.heading: ASSESMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT
text.p: All the members of the Department unanimously supported Mr. 's application for Leave of Absence form the University to enable him to take up appointment as a Special Assistant to the Ondo State Governor and Member Board of the State Information Technology Agency (SITA). The appointment which was for a period of Four (4) years was effective from March 2, 2009.

Mr. 's appointment into office by the Ondo State Government was a form of community service, a cognate part of the normal schedule of an academic. Mr. had undertaken to conclude all his teaching and Long Essay supervision responsibilities for the current Semester.
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION FROM THE DEPARTMENT
text.p: The Department recommended for approval Mr. 's application for Leave of Absence for four (4) Academic Sessions effective March 2nd 2009.
text.heading: COMMENTS OF THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: The Panel received and considered Paper No which contained application for Leave of Absence in respect of Mr. , Minutes of the Department Review Panel, Head of Department Report, Letter of Appointment as member and the curriculum vitae of Mr. .
The Panel noted that Mr. had just been appointed a Special Assistant to the Ondo State Governor and Member of the Board of the State Information Technology Agency (SITA) by the Ondo State Government.

The Panel also noted that the appointment was a full time political appointment that will span four (4years). The appointment would afford Mr. the opportunity to access more political and administrative information, experience practical public administration and also increase his data profile.
The Panel noted in addition that Mr. would conclude all University assignments, particularly his Departmental and Faculty responsibilities before commencing the leave.
It was reported that to the Ondo State Governor and Member Board of the State Information Technology Agency (SITA)'s salaries had been stopped since March when he took up the appointment.
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION FROM THE FACULTY REVIEW PANEL
text.p: In view of the fact that members of staff are released on national assignments and in recognition of the worth of the University outside, coupled with the favourable reports from the Department, the Faculty Review Panel recommended that Mr. 's application for Leave of Absence be approved.
